use_cases: Display user stories in a horizontal scrolling carousel similar to Instagram or WhatsApp
Showcase user-generated content with avatar thumbnails and ring indicators
Navigate through sequential story content with click interactions
Present creator profiles with visual hierarchy using avatar fallbacks
Enable quick content discovery through a compact story row component
ai_summary: A social media-style stories carousel component that displays user avatars in a horizontal row with click-to-advance navigation. Built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS for a clean, accessible interface. Supports story indicators and smooth transitions between content pieces.
